title: Bennie the Howl
actors: Matvei Lyarov, Yuri Shumsky, Nikolai Nademsky
plot: The seamy Jewish underworld of Odessa is the setting for Isaac Babel's story based on the life of gangster king Mishka Yaponchik "Mike the Jap" Vinnitsky. Murder is a way of life for Benya and his gang until he finds himself ensna...
